name: Codec.JsonTape.Encode
comment:
This module provides JSON encoder of a directory tree.

@docs dirTree

name: Codec.JsonTape.Decode
comment:
This module provides JSON decoder of a directory tree.

name: Codec.JsonTape

unions.name: DirTree
unions.comment: Data structure representing a directory tree.

values.name: getName
values.comment: Auxilliary function for circumventing the type system.

values.name: getObject
values.comment: Traverse the directory tree along path and return the seeked object.

values.name: readFile
values.comment: Traverse the directory tree along path and return the content of the found file after base64 decoding it.

values.name: readFileRaw
values.comment: Traverse the directory tree along path and return the content of the found file.
